title: MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: CENTER FOR FAMILY DEVELOPMENT SOUTH BUILDING MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health assessments and individual, family, and group counseling for children, adolescents, and adults. Addresses concerns ranging from mood changes to more serious mental health conditions, as well as challenges related to life and family transitions. Areas of focus include child abuse, sexual behavior concerns, depression, ADHD, anxiety, and behavioral challenges. Provides trauma-informed care that considers physical, psychological, and social factors. Home visits for counseling are available by arrangement. 1501 Pearl Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, evening and weekend availability as needed Email (541) 342-8437 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 342-8437 Main phone Main phone (541) 342-8437 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: OHP and some private insurance accepted. Sliding scale mental health services available through the intern training clinic. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Guidance Community Mental Health Agencies Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTER FOR FAMILY DEVELOPMENT SOUTH BUILDING
